name: Pineapple Cake
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Mixed Fruit (such as peaches, cherries, or berries)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the flour and baking powder until just combined.
4. Fold in the mixed fruit, golden raisins, and red candied cherries.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured tube pan, spreading it evenly.
6. Allow the mixture to set for several hours or overnight.
7. In the morning, preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
8. Bake in the center of the oven for approximately 2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Let cool before removing from the pan.
